name: Drive-by Compromise
description: Compromise of workstation or server through malicious website.

name: Supply Chain Compromise
description: Infecting hardware or software before delivery.

name: Spearphishing Attachment
description: Targeted phishing email to OT personnel.

name: Data Historian Compromise
description: Attack against historian server for stealing process data.

name: Monitor Process State
description: Passive monitoring of the industrial process.

name: Program Download
description: Downloading malicious software to a PLC.

name: Modify Controller Tasking
description: Modification of the logic in the PLC controller.

name: Spoof Reporting Message
description: Sending fake data to the SCADA system.

name: Denial of Service
description: Overloading the OT network or devices.
